calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Title Of Trust Property
Off Calendar May-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. CHRISTINE CRAIG FOR PETITIONER MIRELLA CURLETTO WHO IS ALSO PRESENT.

MS. CRAIG REPORTED TO THE COURT REGARDING THE 2 PROPERTIES AND THE CHARLES SCHWAB ACCOUNT.
PETITIONER'S ATTORNEY STATED THAT THE 2 REAL PROPERTIES WILL GO TO THE TRUST. AND WITH REGARDS TO THE CHARLES SCWAB ACCOUNT THE INTENTION IS TO ALSO HAVE IT TRANSFERRED TO THE TRUST. THE MERRIL ACCOUNT WAS CLOSED AND WAS TRANSFERRED TO THE CHARLES SCWAB ACCOUNT. THE ACCOUNT WAS OPENED WITH ONE DAUGHTER IN THE TITLE TO ENABLE HER TO HELP WITH THE ACCOUNT. THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT/SAJJA RAVINANTAPRICHA REPORTER: KATH BERSAMIN, CSR # 11722

Petition To Confirm Title Of Trust Property
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Continued To Apr-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
